## What changed

Describe the user or developer outcome and why the change is needed.

## Safety

- [ ] Every ADB and scrcpy action still targets one exact endpoint.
- [ ] Ambiguous endpoints remain separate; no physical-phone identity is invented.
- [ ] No hidden Android settings write, required companion app, or embedded scrcpy renderer was added.

## Validation

### Automated checks

List exact commands and results.

### UI-visible outcomes

Describe what was inspected in the foreground app.

### Physical-device checks

List hardware and routes tested, or state that none were run.

### Not run / remaining risks

Call out skipped checks and release implications.
